summary: In the lush, high-range highlands of Kerala, a legendary tug-of-war competition brings the local village to life. Shaji Pappan, a charismatic and confident Indian man known for his rugged charm, thick handlebar mustache, and signature black shirt and red mundu, is the heart of his team. However, disaster strikes when he slips on a banana peel mid-competition, leading to a hilarious and embarrassing defeat. As if physical injury wasn't enough, Shaji faces domestic turmoil when his wife, fed up with his antics, packs her bags and leaves him while he recovers in bed. The story takes a turn for the absurd when Shaji and his team win a 'prize' during the festival: Pinky, a small, innocent, completely white domestic goat with no horns. This prize, far from what they expected, becomes an integral part of their chaotic journey. While traveling in their battered white van, the group encounters a police checkpoint, leading to a series of comedic misunderstandings, including the entire team being detained and forced to stand in a police station wearing nothing but colorful bermuda shorts. The plot thickens with the arrival of the 'Bangkok Gang,' led by 'Dude,' a stylishly dressed villain with finger-guns and over-the-top swagger, and the intimidating Saatan Xavier. They are in search of the 'Neela Koduveli,' a rare magical plant rumored to bring immense wealth. The narrative descends into a cross-country chase involving a mysterious savior, a chain of slippery thieves, and a climactic three-way brawl between Shaji's team, the police, and the Bangkok gang. In a shocking twist, a mysterious box believed to hold the plant contains only cowdung. The chaos peaks when Pinky the goat unwittingly eats the real Neela Koduveli, sparking a final, multi-frame chase through the Kerala countryside. Shaji Pappan, chasing the goat that ate his fortune, ends the tale in a state of glorious, high-octane mayhem.

scenes.title: The Journey Begins
scenes.description: A stylized comic world map viewed from above, Bangkok marked with a red pin, a small cartoon airplane with a dotted travel path arcing across the ocean heading toward India. The route curves across water and land illustrated in comic style, ending at a green hill region labeled 'Kerala – High Range' with lush mountains and tea plantations.

scenes.title: Shaji Pappan — The Hero
scenes.description: A crowded rural Kerala festival ground with villagers cheering during a tug-of-war competition. Center frame: Shaji Pappan, looking exactly like actor Jayasurya with a thick black handlebar mustache, wearing his iconic black shirt and vibrant red mundu (dhoti), standing confidently with a mischievous grin. A large title card reads 'SHAJI PAPPAN' behind him in bold comic-book lettering.

scenes.title: The Banana Peel Disaster
scenes.description: Close-up of a yellow banana peel lying on dusty ground right under Shaji Pappan's foot as he strides toward the tug-of-war rope. Next instant: Shaji Pappan slipping dramatically, legs flying upward into the air, face frozen in shock, teammates reeling backward, village crowd erupting in laughter. Bold comic action lines and 'SLIPPPP!' text effect across the panel.

scenes.title: Sick in Bed — Wife Leaves
scenes.description: Interior of a traditional Kerala village house with wooden furniture and herbal medicine bottles. Shaji Pappan lying weakly on a traditional wooden cot with a blanket over him, an Ayurvedic doctor holding herbal paste. His wife stands at the doorway with a packed travel bag, fierce angry expression, pointing her finger directly at Shaji.
scenes.dialogue: Ponnappachettan enne ponn pole nookkum... Cherinja komban nthina Shajiyetta nettipattam?

scenes.title: The Prize — A White Goat!
scenes.description: Prize reveal at the festival: a village committee member with a microphone announces the tug-of-war prize. Presented dramatically on a decorated platform is a small, completely white domestic goat with no horns whatsoever, soft fluffy white fur, small dark hooves, and gentle brown eyes, tied with a bright ribbon. Shaji Pappan and his teammates stare in shocked disbelief. One teammate cups his hands to shout in realization.
scenes.dialogue: Adutha varsham moori kuttan! — Ith penn aad aanallo!

scenes.title: The Van & The Police Checkpoint
scenes.description: An old battered white van driving through a narrow village road at night, Pinky the white hornless goat visible through the back window. Police standing on the roadside wave the van down for a drunk-driving check. Inside, Arakkal Abu, a tall dark-skinned man with a shaved head and rough features wearing a sleeveless shirt, whispers urgently to Shaji Pappan.
scenes.dialogue: Ee aattkaatam thinno Shajiyetta... Aattkaatam chavacha kallinte manam kittilla.

scenes.title: Police Station Chaos — Bermuda Shorts!
scenes.description: Police station exterior, a jeep arrives in a cloud of dust. Comedy reveal inside: Shaji Pappan and all his friends stand in colourful patterned bermuda shorts only, no shirts, looking deeply embarrassed. The police officers stare wide-eyed in absolute shock and confusion. Pinky the white hornless goat is also present on a leash.

scenes.title: The Bangkok Gang Arrives
scenes.description: A stylish, dramatic comic panel introducing the Bangkok gang. Leading them is 'Dude' — Sunny Wayne, a slim young Indian man with short styled hair, wearing sunglasses, a casual jacket and jeans, pointing finger-guns coolly. Behind him stand other gang members including Saatan Xavier, an intimidating older man with a thick build, graying temples, dark kurta, and a menacing expression.
scenes.dialogue: Call me dude... ntha thante peer? — I am from underworld... dollar enik preshnamilla...

scenes.title: The Mysterious Saviour & Neela Koduveli
scenes.description: A mystical entry: smoke and dramatic lighting as a robed mysterious figure enters. The crowd reacts with awe and confusion. The Saviour dramatically explains the legend of the Neela Koduveli — a rare magical plant. People crowd around in a mix of disbelief and fascination, comic aura lines radiate from the Saviour.
scenes.dialogue: Ith aaano ninte gajaraja muth? — Neela Koduveli... ith kandavarku sarva kelvi kittum!

scenes.title: Stealing the Box
scenes.description: A frantic multi-panel sequence: a random thief grabs the mystery box and sprints away. Another thief snatches it from him mid-run. Then the first thief grabs it back. All three tumble over each other. A phone rings and someone panics. The box passes between hands like a hot potato against a chaotic Kerala street background.
scenes.dialogue: Nammade Koduveli aaro kidnap cheythond poyi...

scenes.title: The Great Fight & Box Reveal
scenes.description: A massive brawl: Shaji Pappan, the police, and the Bangkok gang all fighting in one giant chaotic frame. Shaji exhausted in the center. Police finally grab the mystery box and open it dramatically. Inside: cowdung. The officers stare at each other, one furious, one delivering the deadpan punchline. Background: a flashback panel shows the original Neela Koduveli plant being quietly swapped.
scenes.dialogue: Ith chaanagham alle? — Yes sir... chaanagham. — You idiot! You are suspended!

scenes.title: The Final Chase — Shaji vs Goat vs Everybody
scenes.description: The wildly chaotic finale spread: Pinky the white hornless goat has eaten the real Neela Koduveli plant and is running loose. Shaji Pappan sprints desperately after Pinky with arms outstretched. Police chase Shaji. Bangkok gang members run in every direction. A thief falls screaming into a pit. Everyone is running, shouting, falling — total Kerala comedy mayhem. Final caption box at bottom of frame.
